message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead" summary="Step 7 committed, CI green — verify and approve">
Step 7 (Clarify as Project) is complete at commit 29108c4, CI green.

Most of you have already reviewed and approved. Steve Krug — please verify your blocking item (validation error dead-end page) is resolved in this commit.

If anyone wants to re-review the final version, key files are:
- src/services/inbox_service.rs — clarify_as_project()
- src/routes/inbox.rs — unified clarify handler
- templates/inbox_item.html — radio buttons with fieldset/legend
- static/css/main.css — :has() progressive disclosure

Please send consensus approvals to carson-gross.
</teammate-message>

content.text: My consensus approval was already sent to Carson during the review round. No blocking items from my side. My approval stands for Step 7 at commit 29108c4.
